Package microui.core.style

Class Color

java.lang.Object
microui.core.style.AbstractColor
microui.core.style.Color
public class Color extends AbstractColor
Concrete implementation of AbstractColor representing a solid RGBA color. Provides a comprehensive set of predefined colors and flexible constructors for creating custom colors with validation and constraint enforcement.

This class represents immutable color values with RGBA components. All color values are constrained to the valid range (0-255) and the class includes convenient factory methods and predefined color constants.

Status: STABLE - Do not modify Last Reviewed: 11.10.2025

See Also:

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Color()
    Constructs a default medium gray color (128 luminance, full opacity).
    Color(float gray)
    Constructs a grayscale Color with specified luminance and full opacity.
    Color(float gray, float alpha)
    Constructs a grayscale Color with specified luminance and alpha.
    Color(float red, float green, float blue)
    Constructs a Color with specified RGB components and full opacity.
    Color(float red, float green, float blue, float alpha)
    Constructs a Color with specified RGBA components.
    Color(AbstractColor color)
    Constructs a Color by copying components from another AbstractColor.

  • Constructor Details

    • Color

      public Color(float red, float green, float blue, float alpha)
      Constructs a Color with specified RGBA components.
      Parameters:
      red - the red component (0-255, will be constrained)
      green - the green component (0-255, will be constrained)
      blue - the blue component (0-255, will be constrained)
      alpha - the alpha component (0-255, will be constrained)

    • Color

      public Color(float red, float green, float blue)
      Constructs a Color with specified RGB components and full opacity.
      Parameters:
      red - the red component (0-255, will be constrained)
      green - the green component (0-255, will be constrained)
      blue - the blue component (0-255, will be constrained)

    • Color

      public Color(float gray, float alpha)
      Constructs a grayscale Color with specified luminance and alpha.
      Parameters:
      gray - the grayscale luminance (0-255, will be constrained)
      alpha - the alpha component (0-255, will be constrained)

    • Color

      public Color(float gray)
      Constructs a grayscale Color with specified luminance and full opacity.
      Parameters:
      gray - the grayscale luminance (0-255, will be constrained)

    • Color

      public Color(AbstractColor color)
      Constructs a Color by copying components from another AbstractColor.
      Parameters:
      color - the color to copy (cannot be null)
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if color is null

    • Color

      public Color()
      Constructs a default medium gray color (128 luminance, full opacity).

    • isTransparent

      public final boolean isTransparent()
      Checks if this color is fully transparent.
      Returns:
      true if alpha is 0, false otherwise
